title: Cant't see my app in my accoun
excerpt: I build my app and then installed that in my account. Now, when I go to my dashboard and try to add the app, its not there at all. What could I be missing?

posts.author: Xonshiz (Dhruv Kanojia)
posts.cookedHtml: I build my app and then installed that in my account. Now, when I go to my dashboard and try to add the app, its not there at all. What could I be missing?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Xonshiz

Welcome to the community!

Can you please show me the features section of your app?

You may have created a view instead of a widget.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Xonshiz - welcome!!

Could you post a screenshot of the features section of your app? I think @mitchell.hudson is right here - it might have been a view instead of a widget.

-Daniel

posts.author: Xonshiz (Dhruv Kanojia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

As @mitchell.hudson said… it was a view, and not a widget. I was following the documentation and that’s the thing I saw. Thanks folks!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad to hear @Xonshiz!

If you have any other questions - please let us know!

-Daniel
